methods.name: Stage-Progression
methods.rationale: Applies typical Series D → next-stage step-up multiplier (1.5x) to $1.8B total raised proxy.

methods.name: Peer-Median
methods.rationale: Median across 3 same-sector + same-stage peers in Defense & Security. Range: $1.4B - $9.2B.

public.rationale: Public-co frontier-tech comp in Defense & Dual-use
Public-co frontier-tech comp in Defense & Dual-use

private.name: Saronic
private.rationale: Same sector (Defense & Security), same stage (Series D), post-money $9.25B

private.name: Chaos Industries
private.rationale: Same sector (Defense & Security), same stage (Series D), post-money $4.5B

private.name: Epirus
private.rationale: Same sector (Defense & Security), same stage (Series D), post-money $1.35B

data.narrative:
Saildrone, a Series D defense and security company that has raised $300M+, is valued within a triangulated range supported by two applicable methods and a broader peer universe of 10 comparables (2 public, 8 private).

Stage-progression analysis applies a 1.5x step-up multiplier to a $1.8B base derived from total capital raised, implying a $2.6B valuation. Peer-median analysis of three same-sector, same-stage companies—Saronic ($9.2B), Chaos Industries ($4.5B), and Epirus ($1.4B)—yields a median of $4.5B, with a range spanning $1.4B to $9.2B. The peer set includes additional private comparables such as Anduril Industries and Scale AI, alongside public benchmarks DRSHF and IDEAFORGE.NS.

Triangulation across both methods produces a valuation range of $2.2B (low) to $5.2B (high), with a median of $3.6B. The wide spread between the stage-progression and peer-median results reflects material dispersion in Defense & Security valuations at this stage; the peer range alone spans a 6.6x gap between floor and ceiling. Key uncertainties include the representativeness of the three peer selections, whether Saildrone's capital efficiency and market position warrant placement toward the peer median or above, and the relevance of public comparables given distinct market structures and liquidity profiles.
